title: Enigma Edifice
description: Enigma Edifice is an adventure mod for solo and multiplayers survivals.
body: _By Genius_um_ # Enigma Edifice #### ㅤ ㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤ #### ㅤ --- > ### Enigma Edifice is an adventure mod for solo and multiplayers survivals. Make your world more interresting. With Enigma Edifice you can make new goals. More buildings blocs is comming soon. A biome is avaible : The Soft Biome. This biome appears on surface and in caves.
